features: Gentle and Effective Flossing – Our floss sticks dental floss harps are designed to clean hard-to-reach areas, removing plaque and food debris for a healthier smile. These flossing sticks are ideal for daily use on teeth and gums.

Prevent Plaque and Bad Breath – These floss picks and tooth floss picks help prevent tartar build-up, plaque, and bad breath, ensuring fresh breath and a confident smile every day. This toothpicks floss sticks serves as your handy oral care solution

Designed for All Ages – Perfect for the whole family, including kids flossers for teeth, these dental floss picks or floss harps for teeth are easy to use and gentle on gums. A great choice for promoting good oral hygiene.

Sturdy and Convenient – Each dental floss stick, floss pick, tooth picks floss sticks is made for durability, providing effective cleaning without breaking. Compact and portable for use at home or on the go.

Supports Cleaner Habits – Switch to floss picks for teeth options like these dental harps for teeth or teeth floss sticks. Make a small change while keeping your oral hygiene routine effective and simple.

Our corn starch floss harps are designed for optimal oral hygiene and minimal environmental impact. They effectively clean between teeth, promoting a confident smile and dental health without adding to plastic waste. Can I reach the back teeth easily with these flossers? Yes, the design of our tooth harps ensures easy access to the back of your mouth, enabling a thorough clean in those hard-to-reach areas. Dentists recommend them for a comprehensive oral care routine. How do these dental floss sticks prevent gum disease? Regular use of our dental floss picks helps remove plaque and tartar build-up, reducing the risk of gum disease. They're an essential part of maintaining a healthy, happy mouth. Are these floss picks suitable for daily use? Absolutely, our floss sticks are lightweight, sturdy, and gentle on the gums, making them perfect for daily use. They support a robust oral hygiene routine, ensuring squeaky clean teeth. What savings do I get with this 80 pack? Our 80 pack offers exceptional savings, providing you with a high-quality option for your oral care needs. Enjoy great oral hygiene, a radiant smile, and contribute to less waste.
